errors.1: Invalid or Corrupted Push Buffer Stream. Action: Usually an application crash, not hardware. Check for driver/application mismatch; restart the affected process.
errors.2: Invalid or Corrupted Push Buffer Stream. Action: Usually an application crash. Verify application is using correct CUDA/driver version.
errors.3: Invalid or Corrupted Push Buffer Stream. Action: Application-level error. Check for memory corruption in the launching process.
errors.6: Invalid or Corrupted Push Buffer Stream. Action: Application crash. Review application logs; usually not a hardware fault.
errors.7: Invalid or Corrupted Push Buffer Stream. Action: Application crash. If persistent across applications, check driver installation.
errors.8: GPU Stopped Processing. Action: GPU detected an error and halted. Drain workloads, attempt GPU reset; if persistent, schedule hardware inspection.
errors.12: Driver Error. Action: Reinitialize the driver. If persistent, reinstall the NVIDIA driver package.
errors.13: Graphics Engine Exception. Action: Usually an application fault. Verify CUDA code for out-of-bounds memory access.
errors.14: Link Transition Error. Action: Check NVLink or PCIe link state. Reseat cables and GPUs; inspect for physical damage.
errors.22: Long Running Process Timeout. Action: A GPU kernel exceeded the timeout. Tune CUDA_LAUNCH_TIMEOUT or investigate hung jobs; if systemic, check for thermal throttling.
errors.28: ECC/Driver Firmware Error. Action: ECC scrubbing error. Run nvidia-smi -q -d ECC; if DBE count is rising, drain node and schedule retirement.
errors.29: DRAM ECC Error. Action: Double-bit error in device memory. Drain node immediately. Run page retirement check; escalate to RMA if threshold exceeded.
errors.30: GPU Memory ECC Error (SBE). Action: Single-bit correctable error. Monitor SBE rate; if rising rapidly, schedule maintenance window.
errors.31: GPU Memory ECC Error (DBE). Action: Double-bit uncorrectable error. Drain node, retire affected pages, escalate to RMA if DBEs persist.
errors.32: GPU Memory ECC Error. Action: ECC error detected. Run nvidia-smi --query-retired-pages to assess retirement state.
errors.38: Driver Firmware Error (MMU Fault). Action: Memory management unit fault. Usually application-level. If recurring across jobs, suspect driver or firmware issue; update driver.
errors.43: GPU Stopped Processing. Action: GPU is unresponsive. Drain workloads and perform a controlled GPU reset; reboot node if reset fails.
errors.45: Preemptive Channel Removal. Action: A channel was removed due to a prior error. Review preceding XID events in dmesg; address root cause.
errors.47: ECC Page Retirement Threshold Exceeded. Action: Maximum retired pages reached. Remove GPU from service and initiate RMA process.
errors.48: Double Bit ECC Error. Action: Page retirement required. If threshold exceeded, RMA GPU.
errors.56: Display Engine Error. Action: Display pipeline fault. Restart display services or reboot; if headless server, verify no display driver conflict.
errors.61: Internal Microcontroller Halt (ELPG Timeout). Action: PMU/FECS subsystem timed out. Attempt driver reinit; if persistent, reboot and escalate.
errors.62: Internal Microcontroller Error (Copy Engine). Action: CE firmware fault. Attempt GPU reset. If recurring, update firmware/driver.
errors.63: CE Error. Action: Copy engine error. Drain CE workloads, attempt GPU reset; if recurring, suspect hardware fault.
errors.64: ECC Error. Action: ECC fault in L2 or framebuffer. Run nvidia-smi -q -d ECC and assess DBE count; drain if elevated.
errors.69: Fatal GPU Error (GPC Exception). Action: Unrecoverable GPC exception. Drain node immediately, reboot; if persistent across reboots, escalate to hardware replacement.
errors.73: NVLink Error. Action: NVLink training or recovery fault. Inspect NVLink bridge and cables; run nvidia-smi nvlink -s to confirm link state.
errors.74: NVLink CRC Flit Error. Action: Physical layer issue. Inspect NVLink bridge or OSFP cable for bent pins or debris.
errors.75: NVLink Error (Unrecoverable). Action: Unrecoverable NVLink fault. Take the NVLink pair offline; inspect physical interconnect; schedule hardware replacement.
errors.76: NVLink Recovery Error. Action: NVLink attempted recovery and failed. Drain jobs relying on NVLink; physical inspection required.
errors.77: NVLink Hardware Fault. Action: Hardware-level NVLink failure. Remove node from fabric; inspect bridge, cable, and OSFP; initiate RMA if damage confirmed.
errors.79: GPU Fallen Off the Bus. Action: Check PCIe power cables, reseat GPU, check dmesg for NVRM errors.
errors.80: GPU Fallen Off the Bus (PCIe Error). Action: PCIe enumeration failed. Check power delivery, reseat GPU; verify slot integrity; reboot.
errors.92: High SRAM ECC Error Rate. Action: L1/L2 SRAM ECC error rate is elevated. Monitor closely; if rate accelerates, drain and RMA.
errors.94: Contained ECC Error (SM). Action: Contained single-bit error. Workload may continue but monitor ECC counters; schedule preventive maintenance.
errors.95: Uncontained ECC Error. Action: Uncontained error, data integrity compromised. Terminate affected workloads immediately; drain node; assess for RMA.
errors.96: GSP Error. Action: GPU System Processor error. Attempt driver reinit; update to latest driver/firmware; if persistent, RMA.
errors.98: GSP Error (Timeout). Action: GSP response timeout. Attempt GPU reset or node reboot; update firmware if outdated.
errors.119: GSP RPC Timeout. Action: GSP did not respond in time. Reset GPU or reboot node; if persistent, update firmware or RMA.
